description: India has waived excise duty on blended petrol containing 22-30% ethanol as part of a push to increase ethanol usage. This move coincides with rising fuel prices due to the Middle East crisis, prompting plans for discounted E85 fuel and continued availability of E20 petrol nationwide.

title: Sutapa Sikdar slams Pranit over viral misogynistic clip: 'Sorry after enjoying like joker?'

Sikdar questioned the expectation of female forgiveness and stated that such apologies change nothing. More had initially laughed at the comment before issuing a regretful apology, which has now been publicly dismissed. Read on to know more.

title: Jeff Bezos' 'good bye' post returns as Seattle slips in US city ranking
description: Seattle, once a top US city for foreign investment, has plummeted to 13th place, sparking concern among tech leaders. This decline follows a new state tax on millionaires and a perceived anti-business climate. Prominent figures like Jeff Bezos and Howard Schultz have relocated, raising questions about the city's future economic appeal.

Cristiano Ronaldo, set for a record-tying sixth World Cup appearance, missed several chances and failed to score before being substituted. Pedro Neto opened the scoring, Akor Adams equalised for Nigeria, and substitute Francisco Conceição netted the winner. Portugal will face Congo, Uzbekistan and Colombia in Group K.

The Siraj workload question: How India created cricket's busiest fast bowler
description: Mohammed Siraj's withdrawal from the England and Ireland T20Is raised a curious question: how could a bowler who had drifted out of India's white-ball plans suddenly need rest? The answer lies in the format India have simply refused to play without him. While Jasprit Bumrah's workload was carefully managed, Siraj quietly became India's default fast bowler and the busiest quick in world cricket. For three years, he has been India's workhorse. Now, workload management has finally reached him too.

title: Taylor Swift backs the Knicks while Travis Kelce skips NBA Finals Game 4
description: Taylor Swift attended Game 4 of the 2026 NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden on Wednesday, June 11, wearing a "Stevie Knicks" t-shirt alongside Este and Alana Haim. Fiancé Travis Kelce was absent, occupied by the Kansas City Chiefs' mandatory minicamp in Missouri. The visit is layered with significance — Page Six has reported that Swift and Kelce plan to wed at MSG on the July 3 weekend, making Wednesday's outing a preview of sorts at her own future wedding venue.

title: Messi's passport details among data leaked ahead of Argentina's title defence
description: Argentina's World Cup preparations were hit by a reported security lapse that exposed the passport details of the entire squad, including Lionel Messi, after an unredacted team sheet was circulated. Despite the off-field issue, Argentina finished their warm-up campaign strongly with a 3-0 win over Iceland. Goals from Valentin Barco, Messi and Thiago Almada secured victory ahead of their World Cup opener against Algeria.

title: Kaley Cuoco reveals second baby with Tom Pelphrey; fans flood her post

FIFA World Cup opening ceremony: Time, performers & streaming
description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony will feature three major celebrations across Mexico, Canada, and the United States, making it one of the biggest tournament launches in history. Artists including Shakira, Burna Boy, J Balvin, Tyla, Michael Bublé, and Nora Fatehi are set to perform. Fans in India can watch the ceremonies live on Unite8 Sports channels and Zee5. FIFA president Gianni Infantino called the event “a truly global celebration” uniting music, culture, and football.

Drone boat used in US rescue mission in Hormuz built by company co-founded by Indian-American engineer
description: An autonomous drone boat executed a heroic rescue of two US Army Apache helicopter crew members. This revolutionary craft, called Corsair, was designed by Texas-based Saronic Technologies, co-founded by Indian-American Vibhav Altekar.

title: Oracle founder Larry Ellison loses more than $47 billion in less than 7 days
description: Larry Ellison has seen his net worth plummet by over $47 billion in under a week, dropping from second to fifth richest globally. This significant loss is attributed to a broader selloff in technology and AI stocks, with Oracle shares experiencing a substantial decline ahead of its earnings report.

title: Bill Gates warns Microsoft, Amazon, Google on data center push
description: Bill Gates has told the AI industry it does not have permission to drive up household electricity bills, warning Amazon, Google, Meta and Microsoft that the old utility-funded grid model is finished. Speaking on CNBC, the Microsoft co-founder said hyperscalers must now pick data centre sites where the economics and politics hold. With 48 projects worth $156 billion already blocked in 2025 and public opposition at record highs, the buildout is colliding with sentiment.

title: Roger Federer car collection: Luxury cars, SUVs and Mercedes icons
description: Roger Federer still has eyes on him; he has been on the Mercedes-Benz radar since forever and is an embodiment of a luxury lifestyle. He has an array of beautiful sports cars, superior SUVs and luxury cars that beautifully depict his sophisticated personality. He's not a crazy car enthusiast and wants his garage to be appreciated by tennis fans for its performance and usability, which is why his collection is one of the most loved in tennis.

title: Meet Fabrice Bellard: French engineer behind YouTube, Netflix and TikTok
